title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at ECIL Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at ECIL Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
ECIL Holdings Services, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Thane operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About ECIL Holdings Services:
ECIL Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ECIL Holdings Services!
